value.found_quote: Claude Code is an agent that reads your codebase, edits files, and runs commands across your terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser. Build, debug, and ship with natural language.
value.rationale: The page is Anthropic's official Claude Code product page (https://www.anthropic.com/claude-code). It clearly describes Claude Code as a generally available offering with pricing tiers (Pro at $17/month, Max at $100/month and $200/month), download instructions, and detailed feature descriptions. The product is actively available for macOS, Linux, and Windows with integrations for VS Code, JetBrains, Slack, and more.
